allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 800, 400; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::DarkSlateBlue\); $font = New-Object System.Drawing.Font 'Arial', 60, \([System.Drawing.FontStyle]::Bold\); $brush = [System.Drawing.Brushes]::White; $g.DrawString\('34 ABC 123', $font, $brush, 130, 140\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\('C:\\Users\\recep.yasar\\Claude\\parkTrack2\\test2.jpg', [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Jpeg\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); \(Get-Item 'C:\\Users\\recep.yasar\\Claude\\parkTrack2\\test2.jpg'\).Length)
